---
title: "Resume"

about:
  template: broadside
  image: Headshot1.png
  image-width: 350px
  image-shape: rounded
  links: 
    - icon: save
      text: Download
      href: Sections/Resume/Resume_JonathanBarnes.pdf

format:
  html: 
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 0px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
---

# About Me

::: text-center
<img src="Headshot1.png" class="img-fluid rounded-circle mb-3" style="max-width: 350px;"/>
:::

::: text-center
<a href="Resume_JonathanBarnes.pdf" download class="btn btn-primary"> <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download Resume </a>
:::
